positive: Intricate, highly stylized illustration of a mystical glowing forest clearing. The composition features a strong central element: a whimsical constellation guiding a winding path through ancient, silhouetted trees and oversized ferns. Bioluminescent neon flora in cyan, lavender, and electric blue provides the main light source, contrasting sharply against a deep midnight indigo and teal background. Vector art aesthetic, symmetrical composition, bold clean linework, high contrast, symmetrical, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grainy, amateur, realistic photo, blurry background, messy, poorly rendered
